title: Micro String Bikini Surf
promptText: Foreground Wearing only a tiny white micro string bikini top that has shifted slightly to the side, revealing partial side breast and hardened nipples beneath the wet fabric, paired with ultra-short violet string bikini bottoms riding low on her hips and barely covering her, both pieces soaked and clinging transparently to her skin, water droplets glistening everywhere, riding a fiery orange-and-white surfboard in a natural, relaxed surfing stance: knees softly bent, one hand trailing in the water, the other resting lightly on her thigh.
